message.undeadnights.command_remove_hord: Removing all horde mobs from this world.
message.undeadnights.command_spawn_horde: Trying to spawn hordes for given players.
Trying to spawn hordes for all available players.
Spawning horde failed (e.g. could not find a spawn location)!
message.undeadnights.horde_night: The sun is starting to set and you feel uneasy about the coming night...
message.undeadnights.horde_night_over: You feel at ease, this Night of the Undead is over...
message.undeadnights.horde_time_over: You feel at ease, the hordes of the Undead have stopped...
message.undeadnights.last_nights: This is the last night before the next Night of the Undead!
message.undeadnights.nights_remaining: %s nights remaining until the next Night of the Undead!
message.undeadnights.spawn_cap_reached: Spawning horde mobs not possible, spawncap reached.
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.allD: Horde nights last a full Minecraft day
If enabled, horde nights last all day long (not only during the night) | default: disabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.bloc: Use spawn proving with lights (e.g. torches)
If enabled, the light level of a block position can prevent horde mobs from spawning | default: disabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.chan: Chance for another horde wave to spawn (in %%)
Chance in %% for another horde wave | default: 7
Chance in %% for a horde night | default: 100
Chance for the lure horde effect to spawn a horde
Chance for the lure horde effect to spawn a horde (1.0 = 100%) | default: 0.2
Chance to get the lure horde effect
Chance to get the lure horde effect, when the player kills a horde mob (1.0 = 100%) | default: 0.07
Chance in % for a random horde
Chance in % for a random horde (checked once per night, on none-horde nights) | default: 15
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.cool: Time between checks for next horde wave (in seconds)
Time in seconds between check for next possible wave in a horde night | default: 45
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.days: Number of days between horde nights (1 = every night is a horde night) | default: 5
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.debu: Make horde mobs glow for debugging
If enabled, horde mobs will have the glowing effect for debugging | default: disabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.demo: If enabled, Demolition Zombies will spawn naturally | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.dist: Maximum distance a horde will spawn away from the player | default: 75
Minimum distance a horde will spawn away from the player | default: 70
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.dura: Duration in seconds for the lure horde effect
Duration in seconds for the lure horde effect | default: 60
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.elit: If enabled, Elite Zombies will spawn naturally | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.enab: Killing a horde mob can give the player the lure horde effect
If enabled, killing a horde mob can give the player the lure horde effect (this will attract horde mobs in the area) | default: enabled
A random horde can spawn on none-horde nights
If enabled, a random horde can spawn on none-horde nights | default: disabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.grac: Grace period before the first horde night
Grace period in days before the first horde night | default: 0)
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.hord: Horde mobs SpawnCap
Maximum amount of horde mobs that can be loaded in the world at the same time | default: 80
Prevent players from sleeping through horde nights
If enabled, Players can't sleep through horde nights | default: enabled
Enable the a horde has spawned message and play the horde sound
If enabled, the horde has spawned message and the horde sound are enabled | default: enabled
Can horde waves spawn in water
If enabled, horde waves can spawn in water | default: disabled
Can horde waves spawn on trees
If enabled, horde waves can spawn on trees | default: disabled
Will horde zombies burn in daylight
If enabled, the horde zombies (only those added by this mod) will burn in daylight | default: disabled
Are Horde Zombies able to break blocks
If enabled, Horde Zombies can break blocks | default: disabled
Horde, Elite and vanilla zombies will push each other up
If enabled, (Horde, Elite and vanilla) zombies can push each other up (WWZ style) | default: enabled
Horde Zombies (incl. vanilla) have increased water movement speed
If enabled, Horde Zombies (incl. vanilla) have increased water movement speed | default: disabled
Natural spawning horde zombies
If enabled, Horde Zombies will spawn naturally | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.lure: Lure horde effect can spawn a horde
If enabled, getting the lure horde effect can spawn a horde | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.maxB: Maximum block light level so a monster can spawn
Maximum block light level so a monster can spawn | default: 0
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.maxH: Maximum number of hordes per horde night
Maximum number of hordes that can spawn per horde night (0 = unlimited) | default: 0
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.noNa: Elite and Demolition zombies will not spawn naturally before first horde night
If enabled, Horde, Elite and Demolition zombies will not spawn naturally before the first horde night | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.nonH: Killing none-horde zombies can also give the player the lure horde effect
If enabled, killing zombies that were not spawned in a horde can also give the player the lure horde effect | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.pers: If enabled, the horde mobs will be persistent and not despawn | default: disabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.prev: Prevent horde mobs from despawning when inside max tracking range
If enabled, horde mobs will not despawn when inside their max tracking range | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.prin: If enabled, debug messages will be logged out | default: disabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.send: Send message to player with countdown till next horde night
If enabled, each night a message will be send to the player how many night before the next Horde Night | default: disabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.spaw: Spawn additional waves in a horde night
If enabled, additional waves will spawn in a hoard night | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.unde: Enable Nights of the Undead mod?
If enabled, Nights of the Undead (horde nights) are enabled | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.vani: Will vanilla zombies burn in daylight
If enabled, the vanilla zombies will burn in daylight | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.option.zomb: Horde Zombie block break tier (1 - glass & dirt, 2 - fences & stones, 3 - iron doors & bars, 4 - obsidian) | default: 1
text.autoconfig.undeadnights.title: Undead Nights
